LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CANON CONSTRUCTORS NORTH, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO SRIKE IS FILED. A DECLARATION MUST THEN BE FILED WHICH SPECIFIES WHETHER THE MEET AND CONFER WAS IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 30, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CANON CONSTRUCTORS NORTH, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Canon Consructors North, Inc.'s demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 30, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CANON CONSTRUCTORS NORTH, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Canon Consructors North, Inc.'s motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to srike is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 30, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
